meta.description: A form field specification in a future state document.

inputType.description: UI input type (e.g. text, select, date).

requiredForNew.description: Required when creating a new record.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_bbe48818_7bf4_4954_ae95_cc767fb10c87" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "db_field" TEXT,
    "input_type" TEXT,
    "data_type" TEXT,
    "char_limit" INTEGER,
    "required_for_new" BOOLEAN,
    "mandatory" BOOLEAN,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_bbe48818_7bf4_4954_ae95_cc767fb10c87" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_bbe488187bf44954_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
